commentaries.author: Thomas Aquinas
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They ravished the women in Zion, and the maidens in the cities of Judah. Here special persons are viewed. For instance, women ravished in Zion by men corrupting women. As Deuteronomy 28:30 records: "You shall betroth a wife, and another man shall lie with her. " And further on: '"Your sons and your daughters shall be given to another people, while your eyes look on and fail with longing for them all the day. " (Deuteronomy 28:32).
